calendar.matters:
Motion For Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES - Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; Reporter: Mary J. Hinds; Bailiff: L. Pierotti. APPEARANCES: Kenneth N. Burns, Esq., for plaintiff; J. Michael Phelps, Esq., for defendant. The court awards plaintiff $80,000.00 attorney fees and costs, against defendant. Order signed, filed and scanned this date.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2003 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Ex Parte Application For Judgment Pursuant To Prior Settlement.
Off Calendar Oct-28-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jan-07-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2002 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; not reported. Appearances: Plaintiff's representative and insurance adjuster with counsel, Kenneth N. Burns, Esq.; defendant with counsel, J.; Michael Phelps, Esq. The court conducts a settlement conference. A tentative settlement is reached, but the court orders that the case remain on the master trial calendar.

STATUS CONFERENCE
